AboutPage.metaDescription: Discover ImmoCM's mission, the real estate listings platform in Cameroon.
AboutPage.title: About ImmoCM
AboutPage.paragraph1: ImmoCM is a Cameroonian real estate listings platform dedicated to the cities of Douala and Yaoundé. Our mission is to simplify the search for and publication of rental and sale listings, by directly connecting owners, agents, and tenants or buyers.
AboutPage.paragraph2: Every listing published on ImmoCM is reviewed by our team before going live, to guarantee the reliability of the information shown to visitors.
AboutPage.paragraph3: ImmoCM is free for agents and owners who want to post a listing, and free for visitors browsing listings.

LegalPage.metaDescription: Legal notice and privacy policy for ImmoCM.
LegalPage.title: Legal notice
LegalPage.publisherBody: ImmoCM is a real estate listings platform operating in Douala and Yaoundé, Cameroon.
LegalPage.termsBody: Using the ImmoCM website implies full and unconditional acceptance of these terms. Every listing published must correspond to a property that is actually available, with accurate information. ImmoCM reserves the right to refuse or remove any listing that does not comply with these terms.
LegalPage.privacyBody: Personal data collected (name, phone number, email) is used solely to connect listers with visitors, and is never resold to third parties.
